# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { get as getEdgeConfig } from '@vercel/edge-config';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

type FeatureFlags = Record<string, boolean>;

type AppConfig = {
  API_KEY: string;
  DB_URL: string;
  FEATURE_FLAGS: FeatureFlags;
};

const DEFAULTS: AppConfig = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  FEATURE_FLAGS: {},
};

async function readConfig(): Promise<AppConfig> {
  const edgeConfigId = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;

  if (!edgeConfigId) return DEFAULTS;

  try {
    const [apiKey, dbUrl, featureFlags] = await Promise.all([
      getEdgeConfig<string>('API_KEY'),
      getEdgeConfig<string>('DB_URL'),
      getEdgeConfig<FeatureFlags>('FEATURE_FLAGS'),
    ]);

    return {
      API_KEY: apiKey ?? DEFAULTS.API_KEY,
      DB_URL: dbUrl ?? DEFAULTS.DB_URL,
      FEATURE_FLAGS: featureFlags ?? DEFAULTS.FEATURE_FLAGS,
    };
  } catch {
    return DEFAULTS;
  }
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const cfg = await readConfig();
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const flagKey = url.searchParams.get('flag');

  const body = {
    EDGE_CONFIG: process.env.EDGE_CONFIG ?? null,
    API_KEY: cfg.API_KEY,
    DB_URL: cfg.DB_URL,
    FEATURE_FLAGS: cfg.FEATURE_FLAGS,
    flag:
      flagKey != null
        ? { key: flagKey, enabled: Boolean(cfg.FEATURE_FLAGS[flagKey]) }
        : null,
  };

  return new Response(JSON.stringify(body, null, 2), {
    status: 200,
    headers: {
      'content-type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8',
      'cache-control': 'no-store',
    },
  });
}
